title: I’m like the drugs I take: fun initially, then quickly exhausting.
content:
I’m like the drugs I take: fun initially, then quickly exhausting.

My dad shaves my neck, the back, not the front.

My family is what I like to call soft bigots. They wouldn't gay bash or run over a black child.

Real trauma.

Antisocial personality disorder. An unfixable brain thing. Personality disorders hold no cure, no other side of the rainbow. Deal or cock. Hand of cards or a hand of bullets. Too similar those two elements of human. Chaos
Random
Unimportance
JFK head bye bye
So important
The world turns regardless;
Folks pause: matrons cry, patrons exercise.
context: From document: I’m like the drugs I take: fun initially, then quickly exhausting…
